introSection: Wilde Maus was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster built by German showman Heinrich that was previously located at Loudoun Castle in Galston, East Ayrshire, Scotland, England. The ride was scrapped at the end of the 2001 season and was replaced by Viper the following year.
fullText: Wilde Maus was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster built by German showman Heinrich that was previously located at Loudoun Castle in Galston, East Ayrshire, Scotland, England. The ride was scrapped at the end of the 2001 season and was replaced by Viper the following year.
